baseLanguageTag.description: Tag of one of created languages, to select it as base language. If not provided, first language will be selected as base.

icuPlaceholders.description: Whether to use ICU placeholder visualization in the editor and it's support.

flagEmoji.description: Language flag emoji as UTF-8 emoji

tag.description: Language tag according to BCP 47 definition

organizationId.description: Organization to create the project in

slug.description: Slug of your project used in url e.g. "/v2/projects/what-a-project". If not provided, it will be generated
